mapper.sql: select bfi.id, bfi.building_id, bfi.floor_name, bfi.type, bfi.floor_number, bfi.created_by, bfi.created_time, bfi.updated_by, bfi.updated_time, bfi.del_flag, bfi.dept_id, bfi.floor_length, bfi.floor_width, bfi.background_img_id, bi.name as building_name, d.dept_name from building_floor_info bfi left join building_info bi on (bfi.building_id = bi.id) inner join sys_dept d on (bi.dept_id = d.dept_id)
mapper.select: select bfi.id, bfi.floor_name, bfi.building_id, tbpi.ter_sn, ti.ter_status, tss.sensor_type, tss.sensor_status from building_floor_info bfi LEFT JOIN building_point_info bpi ON (bfi.id = bpi.floor_id and bpi.del_flag = '0') LEFT JOIN ter_building_point_info tbpi ON (bpi.id = tbpi.point_id) LEFT JOIN ter_info ti ON (tbpi.ter_sn = ti.sn and ti.del_flag = '0') LEFT JOIN ter_sensor_status tss on tbpi.ter_sn = tss.ter_sn WHERE bfi.del_flag = '0' and bfi.building_id=#{buildingId} order by bfi.floor_number ASC,tbpi.ter_sn ASC
where bfi.floor_name = #{floorName} and bi.name = #{buildingName} and bfi.del_flag='0' ${params.dataScope}

select count(1) from ter_building_point_info tbpi left join building_point_info bpi on tbpi.point_id = bpi.id where bpi.floor_id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into building_floor_info
id, building_id, floor_name, type, floor_number, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag, dept_id, floor_length, floor_width, background_img_id,
#{id}, #{buildingId}, #{floorName}, #{type}, #{floorNumber}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{delFlag}, #{deptId}, #{floorLength}, #{floorWidth}, #{backgroundImgId},

insert into building_floor_info( id, building_id, floor_name, type, floor_number, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, del_flag, dept_id, floor_length, floor_width, background_img_id)values
(#{item.id},#{item.buildingId},#{item.floorName},#{item.type},#{item.floorNumber}, #{item.createdBy},#{item.createdTime},#{item.updatedBy},#{item.updatedTime}, #{item.delFlag},#{item.deptId},#{item.floorLength},#{item.floorWidth},#{item.backgroundImgId})
mapper.delete:
delete from building_floor_info where id in
#{id}

update building_floor_info set del_flag='2' where id in
#{id}
